notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, pitcher Nolan McLean to shortstop Francisco Lindor to first baseman Mark Vientos. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno doubles (4) on a fly ball to right fielder Brett Baty. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Jose Fernandez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno doubles (5) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Luis Robert Jr. Adrian Del Castillo scores.

notableEvents.label: Jared Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young grounds out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
